case_title: JAMES L HAND VS. MARK WUERFEL DOUGLAS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,521.00 FILED BY HAND, JAMES L AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, MARK WUERFEL MARK DOUGLAS WUERTFEL ESQ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
